bugs_found_and_fixed: uv run in SkyPilot YAML setup/run sections (uv not in runner image)
scripts/configure_dvc_remote.py referenced but scripts/ not in Docker image
DVC init + remote config must be inlined in setup sections (no .dvc/ in image)
sky check --cloud runpod -> sky check runpod (wrong CLI flag)
sky.jobs.queue() API: missing refresh param + ManagedJobRecord is pydantic not dict
Dockerfile.base Python 3.13 via deadsnakes PPA (Ubuntu 24.04 ships 3.12)
Dockerfile.base Phase B missing pyproject.toml (bind mounts don't persist)
.dockerignore excluded README.md but pyproject.toml readme field needs it
